retries.statusDetails:
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed

Expected pattern: /^(.*)\/sign-in(.*)$/
Received string:  "https://account.staging-paymium.com/logout?redirect=%2Fmerchants%2Foverview"
Timeout: 30000ms

Call log:
  - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 30000ms
    11 × unexpected value "https://account.staging-paymium.com/merchants/overview"
    4 × unexpected value "https://account.staging-paymium.com/logout?redirect=%2Fmerchants%2Foverview"
